name: Li Xin

skills.name: Ashen Razor
skills.description: Gains EXP when hitting enemy heroes with Basic Attacks and Chaos Wave.

skills.name: Chaos Wave
skills.description: Unleashes sword energy, damaging and slowing the target.

skills.name: Dark Awakening
skills.description: Transforms into Revenge form. This process cannot be interrupted and is faster at higher skill levels.

skillsZh.name: 灰暗利刃
skillsZh.description: 李信普攻和【強力斬擊】命中英雄獲得經驗值。

skillsZh.name: 強力斬擊
skillsZh.description: 李信斬出劍氣對目標造成傷害和減速效果。

skillsZh.name: 力量覺醒・暗
skillsZh.description: 李信轉換為狂暴形態，此過程無法被打斷，變身時間隨技能等級成長而降低。

tips: Li Xin (Warrior): Tier S+ — 53.64% WR (Camp HOK).
tipsZh: 李信（對抗路）：梯度 S+，勝率 53.64%（Camp HOK）。
出裝：不祥徵兆、破魔刀、逐風.

patchHistory.change: Increased Movement Speed and early game base stats, reduced mobility in Revenge form.
patchHistory.detail: Li Xin is rather weak right now, but his Revenge form is very hard to counter. We've boosted his stats in both his forms, especially in the early game, but we've reduced his mobility in Revenge form to make it easier for opponents to chase him down

patchHistoryZh.change: 提升移速和前期基礎屬性，削弱狂暴形態的機動性
patchHistoryZh.detail: 「李信目前的強度偏低，但狂暴形態帶線卻讓對手很難反制；我們提升他全形態（尤其是前期）的屬性，但削弱狂暴形態的機動性，留給對手追上他的可能性。」

faqs.question: Is Li Xin good in current season?
faqs.answer: Li Xin is Tier S+ Warrior with 53.64% win rate, 2.64% pick rate, and 2.84% ban rate (Camp HOK international).

faqs.question: What is the best Li Xin build?
faqs.answer: Recommended: Ominous Premonition, Demonsbane, Tempest, Sage's Sanctuary, Destiny, Boots of Resistance.

faqs.question: How to counter Li Xin?
faqs.answer: Pick Cai Yan, Da Qiao, Guiguzi. Strong into Da Qiao, Liang.

faqsZh.question: 李信 這版本適合上分嗎？
faqsZh.answer: 李信 為 S+ 梯度，勝率 53.64%、選取 2.64%、禁用 2.84%（Camp HOK 國際服）。

faqsZh.question: 李信 出裝怎麼搭配？
faqsZh.answer: 推薦：不祥徵兆、破魔刀、逐風、賢者的庇護、名刀・司命、抵抗之靴.

faqsZh.question: 怎麼克制 李信？
faqsZh.answer: 可選 Cai Yan、Da Qiao、Guiguzi。李信 克制 Da Qiao、Liang。

metaAnalysis: Counters: Da Qiao, Liang. Weak into: Cai Yan, Da Qiao, Guiguzi.
metaAnalysisZh: 克制：Da Qiao、Liang；被克制：Cai Yan、Da Qiao、Guiguzi

guide.overview: Li Xin is a Medium Warrior (Clash Lane) on Honor of Kings Global. Camp HOK ranks them Tier S+ with 52.6% win rate and 1.9% pick rate as of 2026-06-05.
guide.hook: Li Xin: Basic Attacks and Skill 2 grant EXP when they hit enemy heroes.
guide.bestBuild: Rush Boots of Resistance, Axe of Torment, Spikemail, then complete Cuirass of Savagery, Destiny. Use preset tabs for jungle, clash, or CN-style paths when draft requires it.
guide.arcanaSpells: Run Conflict for stats that match Li Xin's Warrior kit. Take Flash — swap to Purify against heavy CC or Smite when jungling.
guide.combo: Standard trade: Lightning Dash → Chaos Wave → Light Awakening → weave basic attacks. Weave basic attacks between skill casts for passive value.

skillOrder.priority: Skill 2 → Skill 1 → Light Awakening (max Skill 2 first)
skillOrder.reason: Max primary utility/damage skill first, then Lightning Dash, and Light Awakening on cooldown.

combos.name: Standard trade
combos.steps: Lightning Dash → Chaos Wave → Light Awakening → weave basic attacks
combos.when: Clash Lane skirmish or objective fight

arcanaRows.effect: Adjust Purify/Execute based on enemy dive.

guide.laning: Trade on your power spike levels (2/4). Call jungler for dive only when enemy flash is down.
guide.teamfight: Flank or dive backline after tanks commit. Do not start fights without vision on enemy jungler.
guide.highRank: Li Xin is a Tier S+ staple in high-elo (Diamond+) on the international server — worth mastering for climb. Ban rate 1.3% — expect Li Xin to be removed in tryhard lobbies; have a backup in the same role. Camp data shows above-average win rate — prioritize when not hard-countered in draft.
comparisons: Li Xin vs Chicha (Warrior, Tier S): Chicha is 1.5% pick / 50.2% WR. Li Xin has +2.4% WR vs Chicha in Camp data. Choose Li Xin when you need Clash Lane identity; choose Chicha for Clash Lane comfort.
Li Xin vs Augran (Warrior, Tier S+): Augran is 1.2% pick / 46.9% WR. Li Xin has +5.6% WR vs Augran in Camp data. Choose Li Xin when you need Clash Lane identity; choose Augran for Jungling comfort.

matchups.summary: Li Xin excels into Da Qiao, Liang. Avoid blind picking into Cai Yan, Da Qiao, Guiguzi without team peel.
